description: Customer service agent — situational judgement + personality, volume hiring
persona: Resourcing manager at a telecoms company running continuous volume hiring for customer service agents. Needs scalable, short assessments. Situational judgement and personality are priorities.

turns.content: We hire customer service agents constantly — hundreds a month. Need something quick and scalable.
For high-volume customer service hiring I'd look at a situational judgement test and a short personality screen. What's your time limit per candidate?
Here are assessments well-suited for volume customer service hiring within 25 minutes...
